response_text:
Deadlift @ 180.0kg — quick take based on this set.
- Eccentric speed range: 0.17s to 1.54s (some reps very fast down)
- Flags seen: ASYM_ROM_ELBOW×0, TEMPO_FAST_ECCENTRIC×1

Suggestions:
- Control the descent: aim for a slower eccentric (e.g., ~0.5–1.0s down) for consistency.
- Left/right ROM looks uneven: check grip symmetry and bar path; film from the front once.
- If you want, tell me your goal (strength vs hypertrophy) and I’ll tailor cues.
